whyMe.title: Why me
whyMe.about: Why are you passionate about coding? You can include some key traits like: analytical thinking, creativity, persistence and collaboration. A problem-solving mindset is always nice to have.

skills.title: My Skills
skills.motivation: Show that you are motivated to continually improve your skills, implement innovative solutions and stay abreast of new technologies.

subtitle.process: How I have organised my work process

bubble.about:
This App is a Slack Clone App.
It revolutionizes team communication and collaboration with its intuitive interface, real-time messaging, and robust channel organization.
bubble.process: How do you keep your code clean and maintainable? Have you broken the project down into reusable modules or components? Focus on documentation, naming files, variables, classes and testing.
bubble.group: How many people were in the team and what was your role? Describe your tasks in 1-2 sentences, for example: login form, dashboard or chat functionality. What technologies did you use? It is nice to mention good teamwork and cooperation.

pollo.about: A simple Jump-and-Run game based on an object-oriented approach. Help Pepe to find coins and poison bottles to fight against the killer Chicken.
pollo.process: How do you keep your code clean and maintainable? Have you broken the project down into reusable modules or components? Focus on documentation, naming files, variables, classes and testing.
pollo.group: As someone who is always trying to learn new technologies, you may have enjoyed working on this project because it allowed you to delve deep into a particular technology. Give details, such as the name of the framework or language you mean.

join.about: Task manager inspired by the Kanban System. Create and organize tasks using drag and drop functions, assign users and categories.
join.process: How do you keep your code clean and maintainable? Have you broken the project down into reusable modules or components? Focus on documentation, naming files, variables, classes and testing.
join.group: How many people were in the team and what was your role? Describe your tasks in 1-2 sentences, for example: login form, dashboard or chat functionality. What technologies did you use? It is nice to mention good teamwork and cooperation.

ongoing.about: What are you currently working on and what features are you implementing? What is the key to success in your projects? You can mention good planning, code quality and execution.
ongoing.about2: Show a desire to learn new technologies and continually improve your skills.

references.title: Need a teamplayer? Here what my colleagues said about me

bubble.quote: ‘’Claudia had to develop, format and deliver content in collaboration with the team members. She is a reliable and friendly person.’’

join.quote: ‘’Claudia is a reliable and friendly person. Works in a structured way and write a clear code. I recommend her as a colleague.’’

pollo.quote: ‘’ She is a trustworthy teamplayer and can cope with the stress of deadlines. Structured work and clear code. ‘’

contact.title: Contact me
contact.intro: Encourage people to contact you and describe what role you are interested in. Show that you will add value to their projects through your work. Example: Feel free to get in touch with job offers or opportunities such as: ...
contact.success: Your message has been sent. You will receive a confirmation email shortly.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again later or use the email link above.
contact.emailInvalid: Your email looks invalid. Check that @ and a domain ending (e.g. .com, .de) are present.
contact.messageError: Message must be at least 10 characters long
contact.privacyCheckbox: I've read the privacy policy and agree to the processing of my data as outlined.
